footer.tagline: Southeast Asia's specialized market research firm. Senior analysts, modern delivery.

home.heroSub: Country-specialist reports across Southeast Asia. Researched by senior analysts, delivered as living documents with free updates for 12 months.
home.latestTitle: What our analysts published this month.
home.featuredTitle: Selected studies from our country desks.
home.industriesTitle: Industries we track across the region.
home.methTitle: Field research, current data, analyst review.

about.heroSub: We are a research firm, not a database. Our work is country-specialist, language-aware, and authored by senior analysts who have spent careers in this region.

methodology.heroTitle: How every report is researched, written, and reviewed.

pricing.heroSub: Two ways to work with us: buy any report off the shelf for $39, or commission a custom study tailored to your decision.

insights.title: Field notes from our analyst desk.
insights.sub: Short reads on what's changing across Southeast Asia — markets we cover, signals we're tracking, methodology we use. Free to read.

library.title: Southeast Asia, by the market.
library.sub: Browse market intelligence reports across 11 countries and 38 industries. Authored by senior analysts. Refreshed continuously.

custom.heroSub: Commission a senior analyst-led project tailored to your decision. Market entry, competitive deep-dives, partner landscapes, regulatory reads — typically delivered in 2–6 weeks.
custom.tierBriefingDesc: Targeted answer to a focused question. 8–15 pages, 1–2 week turnaround. Sized for a specific decision.
custom.tierStandardDesc: Full custom market analysis. Primary research, expert interviews, competitive landscape, scenarios. 3–6 weeks.
custom.tierRetainerDesc: Ongoing analyst capacity for strategy teams covering SEA. Monthly briefings, on-call analyst time, custom deliverables.
custom.processTitle: From brief to delivery in four steps.
custom.processSub: Every custom engagement runs through the same review-led process. No outsourced analyst pools, no ghost authors — your project is led end-to-end by a senior analyst on our team.
custom.step1Desc: 30-minute call to understand the decision behind the brief, current evidence base, and where the answer matters most.
custom.step2Desc: Written scope: research questions, methodology, sources, expert-interview targets, deliverable shape, timeline. Sign-off before fieldwork.
custom.step3Desc: In-region interviews, desk research, data analysis. Modern tools (including AI for synthesis) accelerate the work; senior analysts own the judgment.
custom.step4Desc: Final report, structured findings, and a working session to walk through implications. One revision round included.
custom.formSub: A senior analyst will reply within one business day. If your question is urgent, mention it below and we'll prioritise.
custom.briefPlaceholder: What's the decision behind this research? Markets, segments, players you're focused on. Anything we should know about context or constraints.
custom.successBody: A senior analyst will read your brief and reply within one business day. If you need to share more context, email hello@kiraresearch.com.
